sections_cited: Section 11-E of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5921 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.26256/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 13.02.2025 Mr.M. R. Sethi, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Ameer Nausherwan Adil, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Learned counsel for the Respondent (F.B.R) states that pursuant to the order the subject premises has been de-sealed. He further states that pursuant to a software audit of the POS machines, the respondent Department reserves its right to initiate appropriate legal proceeding under Section 11-E of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. In view hereof, learned counsel for the petitioner states that this petition has served its purpose, therefore, it may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge NASIR
